title: nardosmia palmata
intro: Nardosmia palmata, also known as False Heliotrope, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. The medicinal properties of Nardosmia palmata include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Nardosmia palmata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent.
